user.title: Set up Tunet Inbox
user.description: Configure the shared notification inbox runtime. The default notify target may be either a helper entity that holds a mobile_app device id or a direct notify.* service such as a notify group.

data.notify_device_helper: Default notify target (helper entity or notify.* service)

init.title: Tunet Inbox options
init.description: Update the live Tunet Inbox runtime settings. The default notify target may be either a helper entity that holds a mobile_app device id or a direct notify.* service such as a notify group.

data.notify_device_helper: Default notify target (helper entity or notify.* service)

restore_quarantine_present.title: Tunet Inbox quarantined malformed stored items
restore_quarantine_present.description: Tunet Inbox found {count} malformed stored item(s) while restoring its queue. The malformed payloads were removed from the active runtime and copied into quarantine. Review integration diagnostics before manually cleaning the stored quarantine records.
